messages.content: hi, please improve the following sentence: Canada Life confirmed that your portion of 49% will have to be paid out to yourself, not your wife. Canada Life’s obligation is follow the policy owner’s most recent designation only, and they do not consider the disclaimer from a beneficiary. If your portion was to pay to your wife, Irene should have changed the designation from yourself to your wife. This is about what Irene wanted. If you would like your wife to have the funds then it should be arranged privately. Canada Life will follow the policy owner’s instruction (designation), not the beneficiary’s.

Canada Life has confirmed that you, as the policy owner, are responsible for paying out your portion of 49% to yourself and not your wife. It is important to note that Canada Life will only adhere to the most recent designation provided by the policy owner and will not take into consideration any disclaimers made by beneficiaries. To ensure that your wife receives the funds, Irene should have changed the designation from yourself to your wife. If you wish for your wife to receive the funds, it is recommended that you make arrangements privately. Ultimately, Canada Life will follow the policy owner's instructions (designation), rather than the beneficiary's desires.

The underwriting of your insurance coverage is moving forward. However the underwriter requested the following: 

-	Nexus Holdings’ ownership: Can you please confirm if you and Ken are the only owners of Nexus Holdings? If not, please provide the other owner’s name and percentage. 
-	Dr. Friggstad: the underwriter reached out to Dr. Friggstad through Dynacare on September 1 to obtain medical reports for both you and Ken but hasn’t received any responses yet. When you have a moment, would you mind calling the doctor and ask him to complete the reports as soon as possible? This might help expediting the response time.

The underwriting process for your insurance coverage is currently in progress. However, the underwriter has requested the following information:

- Ownership of Nexus Holdings: Could you kindly confirm if you and Ken are the sole owners of Nexus Holdings? If there are other owners, please provide their names and respective ownership percentages.

- Dr. Friggstad: The underwriter has made attempts to obtain medical reports for both you and Ken from Dr. Friggstad via Dynacare on September 1. Unfortunately, no responses have been received thus far. Therefore, it would be greatly appreciated if you could take a moment to contact the doctor and kindly request that the reports be completed as soon as possible. This will greatly help in expediting the overall response time for the underwriting process.

I am reaching out on behalf of our client, Ada Chan and Paul Ng. They have been clients of MacMillan Estate Planning for the past 4 years and MacMillan designed and implemented the estate plan for them. Paul and Ada reached out to us expressing their wishes to purchase a permanent life insurance policy for their first grandson, Thomas Ng. They understand the significance of setting up permanent life insurance coverage at a young age, as they believe that the future cash value of the policy can greatly support Thomas’s future endeavors as well as it could be used as the most tax efficient way to transfer the wealth to the next generation.

I am contacting you on behalf of our clients, Ada Chan and Paul Ng, who have been long-standing clients of MacMillan Estate Planning for the past 4 years. During their time working with us, MacMillan developed and implemented a comprehensive estate plan tailored to their specific needs.

Ada and Paul recently approached us with the intention of purchasing a permanent life insurance policy for their first grandson, Thomas Ng. They understand the long-term benefits of establishing permanent life insurance coverage at a young age. By taking this proactive step, they believe that the future cash value of the policy can provide substantial support for Thomas's future endeavors, while also serving as a highly tax-efficient method of transferring wealth to the next generation.

Ada and Paul will be the applicants, primary beneficiaries, and payors of the policy. Thomas’s parents, Nathan Ng and Inka Toman will take over the ownership as contingent applicants at the passing of Ada and Paul.

Ada and Paul will assume the roles of applicants, primary beneficiaries, and payors for the proposed life insurance policy. However, in the event of their passing, ownership of the policy will transfer to Thomas's parents, Nathan Ng and Inka Toman, who will become contingent applicants. This arrangement ensures a smooth transition of ownership and responsibility for the policy, aligning with Ada and Paul's wishes for the long-term financial security of their grandson, Thomas.

According to Nathan and Inka, Thomas is a happy easy baby. He saw two specialists since birth. He underwent an allergy test for a suspected milk allergy on April 23, 2023 at Dr. Kavadas’ clinic in  Edmonton. He has also seen a pediatric cardiologist, Dr. Praveen Kumar in Edmonton for suspected heart murmur however it was confirmed by Dr. Kumar as normal after echocardiogram and ECG done on June 28, 2023 and no follow up tests or appointments were required.

Nathan and Inka have provided some additional information about Thomas. They describe him as a happy and easy baby. Since his birth, Thomas has visited two specialists for specific concerns. 

On April 23, 2023, Thomas underwent an allergy test at Dr. Kavadas' clinic in Edmonton. This test was conducted to investigate a suspected milk allergy. 

Additionally, Thomas had an appointment with a pediatric cardiologist, Dr. Praveen Kumar, in Edmonton. This visit was prompted by concerns of a potential heart murmur. However, after performing an echocardiogram and ECG on June 28, 2023, Dr. Kumar confirmed that Thomas's heart was functioning normally. No further tests or appointments were deemed necessary at that time.
it is believed that the results of both visits are available with Thomas's pediatrician, Dr. Briana Goad. The contact information of Dr. Goad is provided in the application if an APS is required.

It is understood that the results of both Thomas's visits to the specialists are most likely available with his pediatrician, Dr. Briana Goad. In the event that an Attending Physician Statement (APS) is requested, the contact information for Dr. Goad will be provided in the application. This will allow the underwriter to obtain any necessary information or documentation regarding Thomas's medical history and the outcomes of his specialist visits.

Paul is a retired dentist and Paul and Ada’s net worth is over $13,000,000 with annual income of over $200,000. Thomas’s parents, Nathan and Inka are also affluent – Nathan is an orthodontist and Inka is an internal medicine physician with a combined annual income of over $300,000.

Paul is a retired dentist and, as a result, he and Ada have accumulated a substantial net worth surpassing $13,000,000. In addition to their impressive net worth, Paul and Ada enjoy a yearly income exceeding $200,000. 

Similarly, Thomas's parents, Nathan and Inka, are financially well-off. Nathan works as an orthodontist, while Inka is an internal medicine physician. Their combined annual income amounts to over $300,000. These financial details provide important context regarding the financial stability and resources of both Paul and Ada, as well as Nathan and Inka.

These financial details provide important context regarding the financial stability of both Paul and Ada, as well as Nathan and Inka, and confirm their ability to pay the annual premium of $3,500 for the next 10 years.

The financial details shared regarding Paul and Ada, as well as Nathan and Inka, provide valuable context and affirm their strong financial stability. Given their significant net worth and substantial annual incomes, it is evident that they possess the means to comfortably cover the annual premium of $3,500 for the next 10 years. Their financial standing reinforces their ability to fulfill their payment obligations for the policy without any financial strain.

Sorry, I misunderstood what you were looking for. We ran the joint first to die 10 year term quotes for you and Graeme, but you did not confirm with us if you would like to go ahead with this or not at that time. If you and Graeme would like to put the term policy in place we can start the application process. Please let me know what your thoughts are.

Apologies for any confusion earlier. I now understand that we previously provided you with joint first-to-die 10-year term insurance quotes, but we did not receive confirmation from you and Graeme regarding your decision to proceed with the policy at that time. If you and Graeme are interested in moving forward with the term policy, we can initiate the application process. Please inform us of your thoughts and whether or not you would like to proceed with the policy.
